message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Sin/Cos primitives

Add 30 oracle tests for Sin and Cos primitives covering:
- Special values at multiples of π/6 (0, π/6, π/4, π/3, π/2, π, 2π)
- Symmetry: sin is odd, cos is even
- Pythagorean identity: sin^2(x) + cos^2(x) = 1
- Periodicity with period 2π
- Phase shift: cos(x) = sin(x + π/2)
- NaN/infinity handling
- Range verification (outputs in [-1, 1])
- 1D/2D tensor shapes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
